summary: Deposit-first booking flow with token-based final payment upload tested successfully. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements working correctly - FinalPaymentPage renders booking summary, deposit checkmark, balance amount, and upload form. Error handling for invalid tokens working.
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings with prefixes: TEST_DepositFlow_, TEST_AdminNotify_, TEST_EmailLink_
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deposit-first payment flow fully functional. Key endpoints: GET /api/public/booking-payment/{token}, POST /api/public/booking-payment/{token}/upload. Email triggers: deposit verification sends email with /payment/{token} link, final upload sends admin notification. Frontend route /payment/:token renders FinalPaymentPage component.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/public/booking-payment/{token}: Returns booking summary (owner, dog, program, price, deposit, balance, overall_payment_status, final_payment_proof_uploaded)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/public/booking-payment/{token}: Uploads final payment proof, blocks if deposit not verified, blocks re-upload
backend_endpoints.PATCH /api/admin/bookings/{id}: When payment_status set to Verified, triggers send_deposit_verified_email

email_functionality.deposit_verified_email: Sent when admin sets payment_status=Verified, contains /payment/{token} link
email_functionality.admin_notification: Sent after client uploads final payment proof

overall_payment_status_transitions.Deposit Pending: Initial state - deposit not yet verified
overall_payment_status_transitions.Balance Pending: After client uploads final payment proof

frontend_components.FinalPaymentPage: Route /payment/:token - renders booking summary, deposit checkmark, balance, upload form
frontend_components.Error handling: Invalid token shows 'Enlace de pago no válido o expirado' error message
frontend_components.Upload states: Form for upload, 'already uploaded' message, 'success' message after upload
frontend_components.Public booking form: Still requires deposit proof upload (Comprobante de depósito field)

security.token_based_access: Public endpoints only reveal minimal booking info (no admin data)
security.upload_guards: Final payment upload blocked if deposit not verified, re-upload blocked

screenshots: /app/test_reports/final_payment_valid_token.jpeg - FinalPaymentPage with booking summary and upload form
/app/test_reports/booking_form_deposit_proof.jpeg - Public booking form with deposit proof field
